name: Tychus
description: An Assassin who shreds High Health enemies.
title: Notorious Outlaw
info: Tychus Findlay is a big man with a big ego and a bigger gun. Fortunately, his loyalty is easily won. Buy him a drink or three and promise him enough credits, and there's no job in the whole universe too dangerous for this outlaw.

Tychus.name: Overkill
Tychus.description: Deal 552 (+4% per level) damage to the target and 276 (+4% per level) damage to nearby targets over 4 seconds. Reactivate to select a new target or direction. Can move and use Abilities while Channeling.

Tychus.name: Frag Grenade
Tychus.description: Lob a grenade that deals 256 (+4% per level) damage, knocking enemies away.

Tychus.name: Drakken Laser Drill
Tychus.description: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 (+4% per level) damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds.

Tychus.name: Commandeer Odin
Tychus.description: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.

Tychus.name: Minigun
Tychus.description: Activate to have Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 2.5% of their maximum Health. Lasts 3 seconds.

TychusOdinNoHealth.name: Annihilate
TychusOdinNoHealth.description: Fire the Odin's cannons in a straight line, dealing 196 (+4% per level) damage to everything in the path.

TychusOdinNoHealth.name: Ragnarok Missiles
TychusOdinNoHealth.description: Launches a volley of missiles at target area, dealing 132 (+4% per level) damage and slowing enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.

1.name: Quarterback
1.description: Increases Frag Grenade's damage by 10% and its range by 45%.

1.name: Dash
1.description: Increase the range of Run and Gun by 50%. When cast, increase Tychus's Movement Speed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.

1.name: Press the Advantage
1.description: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.

4.name: In the Rhythm
4.description: Quest: While Minigun is active, Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increase future Minigun durations by 0.03 seconds.

4.name: The Bigger They Are...
4.description: Increase the damage bonus to 4% while enemy Heroes are above 30% Health, but Minigun no longer has any effect on targets below 30%.

4.name: Master Assassin
4.description: Passive: Increase Tychus's Attack Speed by 10%.  Reward: After getting 15 Takedowns, Tychus's Attack Speed is increased by an additional 15%.

7.name: Melting Point
7.description: Enemies hit by Frag Grenade take an additional 75 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% against Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

7.name: Combat Tactician
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by 4 seconds. Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by an additional 4 seconds after using Run and Gun.

7.name: Relentless Soldier
7.description: Being Stunned or Rooted grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.

10.name: Commandeer Odin
10.description: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.

10.name: Drakken Laser Drill
10.description: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 (+4% per level) damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds.

13.name: Spray 'n' Pray
13.description: Overkill Slows enemy Movement Speed by 25% and its range is increased by 25%.

13.name: That's the Stuff!
13.description: Minigun heals Tychus for 100% of the bonus damage dealt after it expires.

13.name: Neosteel Coating
13.description: Activate to gain 75 Spell Armor for 4 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.

16.name: Armor Piercing Rounds
16.description: Each time Overkill hits an enemy, its damage against them is increased by 15%, stacking up to 60% bonus damage.

16.name: Titan Grenade
16.description: Frag Grenade deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their maximum Health. Each enemy Hero hit by Frag Grenade reduces its cooldown by 1 second.

16.name: Sizzlin' Attacks
16.description: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage to Heroes equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Stacks with Minigun.

20.name: Big Red Button
20.description: Odin lasts 50% longer and Ragnarok Missiles also launches a Nuclear Missile which lands 2.5 seconds later, dealing 319 (+4% per level) damage in its area.

20.name: Focusing Diodes
20.description: Increases the range of the Drakken Laser Drill by 50%. Deals increasing damage the longer it remains on a single target, up to 100% additional damage.

20.name: Can Do This All Day
20.description: Reduce Overkill's cooldown by 5 seconds. While Channeling Overkill, Tychus gains 40 Armor.

20.name: Bob and Weave
20.description: Run and Gun and Odin's Thrusters gain 2 additional charges and reduces Run and Gun's Mana cost from 50 to 25. After using Run and Gun, increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.5 for 4 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.TychusCombatTactician: Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Talent,TychusCombatTactician,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds. Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TychusRunAndGunCombatTacticianTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds after using Run and Gun.
tooltipMarkup.TychusCommandeerOdin: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Weapon,TychusOdin,Range/Weapon,TychusMiniGunRampingSpeedWeapon,Range-1)*100" player="0" precision="1"/>%</c> increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusOdin,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor and lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusOdin,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TychusCommandeerOdinAnnihilate: Fire the Odin's cannons in a straight line, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusOdinAnnihilateDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to everything in the path.
tooltipMarkup.TychusCommandeerOdinBigRedButtonTalent: Odin lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Talent,TychusMasteryOdinBigRedButton,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value* 100)-100"/>%</c> longer and Ragnarok Missiles also launches a Nuclear Missile which lands <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusOdinRagnarokMissilesNuclearBlastCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"/></c> seconds later, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusOdinNuclearBlastDamage,Amount"/></c> damage in its area.
tooltipMarkup.TychusCommandeerOdinRagnarokMissilesTarg: Launches a volley of missiles at target area, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusOdinRagnarokMissilesTargetedDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and slowing enemy Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusOdinRagnarokMissilesTargetedSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusOdinRagnarokMissilesTargetedSlow,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TychusDrakkenLaserDrill: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LaserDrillWeaponDamage,Amount/Effect,LaserDrillWeaponCreatePersistent,ExpireDelay"/></c> damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LaserDrillTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TychusDrakkenLaserFocusingDiodesTalent: Increases the range of the Drakken Laser Drill by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Talent,TychusMasteryDrakkenLaserFocusingDiodes,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value / Weapon,TychusLaserDrillWeapon,Range)*100" player="0"/>%</c>. Deals increasing damage the longer it remains on a single target, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,TychusLaserDrillFocusingDiodesAccumulator,MaxAccumulation*100" player="0"/>%</c> additional damage.
tooltipMarkup.TychusFragGrenade: Lob a grenade that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusGrenadeDamage,Amount"/> </c>damage, knocking enemies away.
tooltipMarkup.TychusFragGrenadeQuarterbackTalent: Increases Frag Grenade's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TychusGrenadeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[QuartebackDamage].Modifier"/>%</c> and its range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,TychusMasteryQuarterback,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,TychusGrenade,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.TychusFragGrenadeTitanGrenadeTalent: Frag Grenade deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TychusGrenadeTitanGrenadeDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health. Each enemy Hero hit by Frag Grenade reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TychusFragGrenadeTitanGrenadeModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.TychusIntheRhythmTalent: Quest: While Minigun is active, Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increase future Minigun durations by seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TychusMasterAssassinTalent: Passive: Increase Tychus's Attack Speed by %. Reward: After getting Takedowns, Tychus's Attack Speed is increased by an additional %.
tooltipMarkup.TychusMeltingPoint: Enemies hit by Frag Grenade take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,TychusMeltingPointDebuff,Duration*Behavior,TychusMeltingPointDebuff,Period)*Effect,TychusMeltingPointDamage,Amount"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusMeltingPointDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds. This damage is increased by <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TychusMeltingPointDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BonusDamage].Modifier"/>%</c> against Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
tooltipMarkup.TychusMinigun: Activate to have Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TychusMinigunDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"precision="2"/>%</c> of their maximum Health. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusMinigunActiveBuff,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TychusNeosteelCoatingTalent: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusNeosteelCoatingSpellShield,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusNeosteelCoatingSpellShield,Duration"/></c> seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusNeosteelCoatingSpellShield,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.TychusOverkill: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusOverkillPrimaryTargetDamage,Amount*12"/></c> damage to the target and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusOverkillSecondaryTargetDamage,Amount*12"/></c> damage to nearby targets over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusOverkillActive,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Reactivate to select a new target or direction. Can move and use Abilities while Channeling.
tooltipMarkup.TychusOverkillArmorPiercingRoundsTalent: Each time Overkill hits an enemy, its damage against them is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,TychusOverkillArmorPiercingRoundsDamageAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c>, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,TychusOverkillArmorPiercingRoundsDamageAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c> bonus damage.
tooltipMarkup.TychusOverkillCanDoThisAllDayTalent: Reduce Overkill's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,TychusCanDoThisAllDayOverkillTalent,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds. While Channeling Overkill, Tychus gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusOverkillCanDoThisAllDayArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor.
tooltipMarkup.TychusOverkillSprayNPrayTalent: Overkill Slows enemy Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TychusOverkillSprayNPraySlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and its range is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,TychusMasterySprayNPray,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Abil,TychusOverkillTargeted,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.TychusPressTheAdvantage: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusPressTheAdvantageAttackRangeModify,EffectArray[1].Value"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.TychusRelentlessSoldierTalent: Being Stunned or Rooted grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusRelentlessSoldierArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusRelentlessSoldierArmorIncrease,Duration"/></c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusRelentlessSoldierArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.TychusRunAndGunBobAndWeaveTalent: Run and Gun and Odin's Thrusters gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional charges and reduces Run and Gun's Mana cost from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,TychusRunAndGun,Cost[0].Vital[Energy]" player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,TychusRunAndGun,Cost[0].Vital[Energy]+Talent,TychusRunAndGunBobAndWeave,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[6].Value" player="0"/></c>. After using Run and Gun, increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusBobAndWeaveAttackRangeBuff,Modification.WeaponRange"Precision="2"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusBobAndWeaveAttackRangeBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TychusRunandGunDashTalent: Increase the range of Run and Gun by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. When cast, increase Tychus's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TychusRunAndGunDashMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TychusRunAndGunDashMovementSpeedBuff,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TychusSizzlinAttacks: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage to Heroes equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c> of their maximum Health. Stacks with Minigun.
tooltipMarkup.TychusThatsTheStuff: Minigun heals Tychus for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the bonus damage dealt after it expires.
tooltipMarkup.TychusTheBiggerTheyAre: Increase the damage bonus to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TychusMinigunTheBiggerTheyAreDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]*100"/>%</c> while enemy Heroes are above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Health, but Minigun no longer has any effect on targets below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.
